title: MRMM-028 [Reprint Edition] Uniform Hunting Aino Kishi - Kishi Aino
overview: Aino Kishi has reappeared in full remosaic because of its popularity! Complete re-mosaic of Max-A's popular series where cute girls in uniforms are prey! Strict father-in-law, always kind brother. In fact, Aino falls into darkness without even knowing that the two of them have a hidden face... The scene where she is kidnapped and confined by a perverted man, and the scene where she is forced to masturbate with a rotor and is forced to have sex is worth seeing! Please enjoy the complete re-mosaic!
